diary.title: Welcome to Our Hub! 💕
diary.text: We just set up our shared Love Hub. Here's to planning everything together — every event, every memory, every dream 💙

story.title: The Beginning of Our Story
story.text: This is where it all starts — our very own space to keep every chapter of us. More memories to come 💕

notes.text: I love you so so much baby
